prompt_text: You’ve reached the Barking Citadel, where the War General of the invading puppies stands surrounded by shattered armor and the echoes of battle. It’s time to end this war.

pass.message: With every ounce of strength earned through battle, you defeat the Barking Kitten War General. Peace returns to the feline realm—for now.

fail.message: The War General's crushing might overwhelms you. Your tale ends here, one heroic pawprint among many.
